title: 付款凭证、到账和财务审核
theme: 从 payment receipt / bank review / finance confirmation 开始
goals: 能向客户索要清晰的付款凭证和交易记录
能说明银行到账和财务审核需要时间，避免误判已收款
能处理到账金额、银行手续费和 pending payment 的沟通

review.title: Day 20 复习
items: 昨天练了 pre-shipment inspection、inspection report、photo confirmation、video confirmation 和 shipment release。
今天进入付款和财务沟通阶段：客户发来付款截图后，不能立刻默认已经到账。
财务沟通要准确：区分 payment receipt、bank review、finance confirmation 和实际 received amount。

preview.scenario: 客户说已经付款，并发来截图。你需要确认付款凭证是否清晰、银行是否到账、财务是否审核完成，以及到账金额是否和 PI 一致。
needToKnow: payment receipt 可以指付款凭证或收款凭证，实际沟通中要结合上下文。
bank review 表示银行处理中，不能说 we received payment，除非财务确认到账。
bank fee 可能导致到账金额少于 PI 金额，需要礼貌说明并让客户确认。

vocabulary.meaning: 付款凭证 / 收款凭证
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户提供付款证明，或供应商确认已收到款项。
vocabulary.example: Could you please send us the payment receipt?

vocabulary.meaning: 银行审核 / 银行处理中
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明银行转账仍在处理中，尚未最终到账。
vocabulary.example: The payment is still under bank review.

vocabulary.usage: 用于公司财务确认款项是否到账、金额是否正确。
vocabulary.example: We will update you after finance confirmation.

vocabulary.usage: 用于国际付款后客户提供的银行汇款凭证。
vocabulary.example: Please send the remittance slip for our finance team to check.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认付款日期、金额、收款人和交易编号。
vocabulary.example: The transaction record should show the amount and bank reference number.

vocabulary.meaning: 到账金额 / 实收金额
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明实际收到的金额，可能与客户汇出金额不同。
vocabulary.example: The received amount is USD 30 less than the PI amount.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明转账中被银行扣除的费用。
vocabulary.example: The difference may be caused by the bank fee.

vocabulary.meaning: 待处理付款 / 未到账付款
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明客户已发起付款但供应商尚未确认到账。
vocabulary.example: The payment is still pending in our bank account.

sentences.label: 索要付款凭证
sentences.natural: Could you please send us the payment receipt?
sentences.business: Could you please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip so our finance team can check it?

sentences.label: 说明银行审核中
sentences.natural: The payment is still under bank review.
sentences.business: The payment is still under bank review, and we will update you after finance confirmation.

sentences.label: 确认到账金额
sentences.natural: The received amount is less than the PI amount.
sentences.business: Our finance team found that the received amount is USD 30 less than the PI amount, possibly because of the bank fee.

sentences.label: 让客户核对交易记录
sentences.natural: Please check the transaction record on your side.
sentences.business: Please check the transaction record on your side and confirm if any bank fee was deducted during the transfer.

sentences.label: 财务确认后更新
sentences.natural: We will update you after finance confirmation.
sentences.business: Once our finance team completes the confirmation, we will update you and arrange the next step immediately.

chatAnalysis.problem: screenshot 太随意，且没有说明财务需要核对什么。
chatAnalysis.better: Could you please send us the payment receipt?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip so our finance team can check it?

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气容易让客户觉得你在否认付款，最好说明银行审核状态。
chatAnalysis.better: The payment is still under bank review.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The payment is still under bank review, and we will update you after finance confirmation.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太直接，容易让客户不舒服；应该说明实收金额差额和可能原因。
chatAnalysis.better: The received amount is less than the PI amount.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Our finance team found that the received amount is USD 30 less than the PI amount, possibly because of the bank fee.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：索要付款凭证

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have arranged the payment.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Could you please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will send it now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. Our finance team will check it after receiving the document.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：银行审核中

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We sent the payment yesterday. Have you received it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The payment is still under bank review in our account.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long will it take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Usually it takes one to three working days. We will update you after finance confirmation.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：到账金额少于 PI

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our finance team found that the received amount is USD 30 less than the PI amount.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We paid the full amount from our side.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. The difference may be caused by the bank fee during the transfer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Let me check the transaction record with our bank.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户付款后核对凭证、到账和手续费

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we have arranged the payment for the order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Could you please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I only have a screenshot from our online bank. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, please send it first. If possible, please make sure the amount, date, beneficiary, and bank reference number are visible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will send the transaction record now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will forward it to our finance team for checking.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you start production after receiving the screenshot?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need finance confirmation first, because the payment may still be under bank review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: But the money has already left our account.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. International payments may take one to three working days before the received amount shows in our account.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check again today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will ask our finance team to check the bank account again today and keep you posted.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What if the payment is still pending?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the payment is still pending, we will wait for bank confirmation and update you as soon as it arrives.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please let us know if there is any difference in the amount.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. We will compare the received amount with the PI amount after finance confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Sometimes our bank deducts a fee.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. If there is a bank fee deduction, we will let you know the exact difference.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the amount is short, can we pay the difference later?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let us confirm the received amount first, then we can discuss how to handle any difference.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. Please update me once your finance team checks it.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Once our finance team completes the confirmation, we will update you and arrange the next step immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also confirm whether the bank information we used was correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I will compare the beneficiary information on your transaction record with our PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. We want to avoid any payment issue.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We will check it carefully and keep the communication clear until the payment is fully confirmed.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请发送付款凭证或汇款单，方便我们财务核对。
exercises.answer: Please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip so our finance team can check it.
acceptable: please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip so our finance team can check it
could you please send us the payment receipt or remittance slip so our finance team can check it

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：payment not arrive
exercises.answer: The payment is still under bank review, and we will update you after finance confirmation.
acceptable: the payment is still under bank review and we will update you after finance confirmation
the payment is still under bank review
exercises.hint: 不要直接否定客户付款，用 bank review。

exercises.prompt: 填空：The received ____ is USD 30 less than the PI amount.
客户说钱已经从他们账户扣了，但你这边还没到账，哪个回复更合适？
options: The payment is still under bank review, and we will update you after finance confirmation.
exercises.answer: The payment is still under bank review, and we will update you after finance confirmation.
acceptable: the payment is still under bank review and we will update you after finance confirmation
exercises.hint: 银行审核中是更稳妥的表达。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：差额可能是银行手续费造成的。
exercises.answer: The difference may be caused by the bank fee.
acceptable: the difference may be caused by the bank fee
the difference may be due to the bank fee
exercises.hint: bank fee 是银行手续费。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you start production after receiving the screenshot? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: We need finance confirmation first, because the payment may still be under bank review.
acceptable: we need finance confirmation first because the payment may still be under bank review
we need finance confirmation first as the payment may still be under bank review
exercises.hint: 截图不等于到账，要等 finance confirmation。

homework: 把 payment receipt、bank review、finance confirmation、remittance slip、transaction record、received amount、bank fee、pending payment 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 bank review 和 finance confirmation。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户说已付款并发截图，你要索要清晰凭证，说明银行审核中，并承诺财务确认后更新。
tomorrow: Day 22 会练尾款、发货前付款和付款提醒。
